use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and user menus
Showing author avatars in comments, forums, and social feeds
Representing users in data tables, lists, and card layouts
Providing fallback initials when user images fail to load
Creating consistent avatar styling across an application
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based Avatar component providing accessible user profile picture display with built-in image loading, fallback initials support, and customizable styling through Tailwind CSS. Features rounded profile images with automatic fallback to background-colored initials, ideal for user identification across dashboards, comments, and social interfaces.
